prompt: Create a fetcher-based WowTransport that sends commands and queries to a Wow CQRS backend at https://api.example.com/wow. Show how to configure the transport with baseURL and handle the response types.
assertions: Configures Fetcher with baseURL pointing to https://api.example.com/wow
Creates CommandClient configured with the fetcher
Creates SnapshotQueryClient or QueryClientFactory with the fetcher
Demonstrates sending a command and handling CommandResult
Demonstrates querying and handling response types
Includes proper TypeScript typing for transport configuration
